name: Quick Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder and salt.
3. Blend shortening, sugar and lemon rind until creamy.
4. Beat in eggs and banana.
5. Add the sifted ingredients to the sugar mixture in about three parts, mixing well after each addition until smooth.
6. Fold in nuts and apricots.
7. Place batter in a greased 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 loaf pan.
8. Bake bread for about 1 hour or until done. Cool before slicing.
